title: The Weekend Spending Trap Draining $4,300 From You
hook: You spend 30% more money on weekends than weekdays — and most budgets completely ignore the two days secretly wrecking your finances.
angle: Weekend spending spikes are a documented behavioral finance phenomenon almost never discussed in personal finance content, despite having a massive lifetime cost
audience: Anyone who budgets Monday-Friday but feels confused why they're still falling short every month
key_numbers: 30% more spending on weekends vs weekdays
$4,316 per year in excess weekend spending
$425,000 lost at retirement over 30 years at 7%
